raw_input.title: Cloud Platform Developer
raw_input.job_html_or_text: InfraPilot is hiring a Cloud Platform Developer for AWS services, Dockerized applications, CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes operations, Terraform, and platform reliability.

profile.base_cv_text:
Ignacio Rodriguez
Backend engineer with Python APIs, Docker, AWS deployment exposure, CI/CD, observability dashboards, Fiction Express, Talan Consulting, Globant, and Balloon Group.
Education
Software Engineering background.

human_review_notes: Reviewed seed case: ATS CV can include supportable cloud-adjacent experience but must avoid certifications, Kubernetes, Terraform, and inflated years.
